'''Jaren Dil''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] citizen who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Junction V]] with his wife [[Cilia Dil]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He helped [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] find Cilia so that they could get information from her.
